Hero.subtitle: Stop Losing Leads & Chasing Invoices
Hero.title:
Automate Your Service Business.
Without Changing How Your Team Works.
Hero.description: We build custom WhatsApp bots, smart scheduling, and auto-quoting systems for Singapore SMEs. Fast setup, zero bloat, instant ROI.

PainPoints.section_title: Is your company stuck in these daily operational bottlenecks?
PainPoints.section_subtitle: Seemingly small manual processes often accumulate into massive wastes of time and money.
PainPoints.point_1_desc: Customer inquiries scattered across chats with no central tracking, leading to missed orders.
PainPoints.point_2_desc: Manually copy-pasting data to make quotes in Excel/Word takes hours while competitors grab the customer first.
PainPoints.point_3_desc: Constantly rescheduling technicians via phone or text messages, resulting in double bookings or missed appointments.
PainPoints.point_4_desc: End-of-month invoice generation and chasing outstanding payments takes days of tedious follow-up.
PainPoints.point_5_desc: No real-time visibility into technician completion status, making it impossible to answer client queries promptly.
PainPoints.point_6_desc: Scattered spreadsheets make it impossible to get real-time dashboards on sales, schedules, or profitability.

Services.section_subtitle: We provide lightweight, flexible, and high ROI solutions specifically designed for SMEs.
Services.service_1_desc: Review current workflows to identify the most time-consuming, error-prone, and high-impact areas for optimization.
Services.service_2_desc: Connect repetitive tasks using n8n, AI, Email, Google Sheets, Forms, Calendar, CRM, and other tools.
Services.service_3_desc: Build CRM, quoting workflows, ticket tracking, payment reminders, Dashboards, or internal management systems.
Services.service_4_desc: Instead of selling expensive SaaS, we act as your fractional system engineers to continuously optimize and support your tools.

HowItWorks.section_subtitle: We are not just selling software; we are your workflow optimization partner, guiding you from identifying pain points to system rollout.
HowItWorks.step_1_desc: We first understand your current workflows, tools, team division, and biggest bottlenecks.
HowItWorks.step_2_desc: We organize chaotic operational steps into clear processes, identifying areas to simplify, standardize, or automate.
HowItWorks.step_3_desc: We integrate AI, n8n, forms, CRM, Email, Calendar, Dashboards, or your existing tools based on your needs.
HowItWorks.step_4_desc: We help your team actually use it, making processes trackable, handoffs smooth, and enabling continuous improvement.

Industries.section_subtitle: See how we map and automate workflows for different service-based SMEs.
Industries.w_1_s1_d: Customer sends request. Bot parses address & job type directly into CRM.
Industries.w_1_s2_d: Assigns technician based on availability and route optimization.
Industries.w_1_s3_d: Technician uploads before/after photos via WhatsApp link on-site.
Industries.w_1_s4_d: Generates PDF invoice, sends payment link, auto-records PayNow status.
Industries.w_2_s1_d: Client chooses weekly/monthly schedules. Preferences stored in CRM.
Industries.w_2_s2_d: Optimizes assignment to minimize transit distance for staff.
Industries.w_2_s3_d: Staff clicks 'Start' on WhatsApp when arriving to log actual hours.
Industries.w_2_s4_d: Generates monthly invoice summaries & schedules reminders for unpaid balances.
Industries.w_3_s1_d: Client sends repair photos. Admin gets instant Slack/WhatsApp alert.
Industries.w_3_s2_d: Builds quotation using templates, lets client sign digitally.
Industries.w_3_s3_d: Sends technician the exact parts list & location via WhatsApp.
Industries.w_3_s4_d: Sends receipt upon payment. Triggers feedback survey request.
Industries.w_4_s1_d: Form collects required corporate tax docs. Saves to Google Drive.
Industries.w_4_s2_d: Generates standard contract. Digitally signed via SMS/Email link.
Industries.w_4_s3_d: Syncs deadline schedule to Trello/ClickUp. Alerts team of tasks.
Industries.w_4_s4_d: Triggers billing via Stripe/GIRO. Auto-reminds for unpaid fees.

FinalCTA.title: Ready to stop wasting hours on manual tasks?
FinalCTA.subtitle: Take a 1-minute workflow audit to quickly identify bottlenecks and priority areas for improvement.
FinalCTA.note: *No credit card. No IT jargon. Just answers.*

Footer.slogan: Streamline processes, let technology help you grow.

WhatsAppMockup.hero_chat_message: Hi Optimaks, I saw the WhatsApp workflow mockup on your website and would like to learn more about automating my service business!
WhatsAppMockup.hero_card1_chat_message: Hi Optimaks, I am interested in the WhatsApp Lead Auto-Capture feature. How can I automatically capture chats into our CRM?
WhatsAppMockup.hero_card2_chat_message: Hi Optimaks, I am interested in the 1-Click PDF Quote feature. How can I automatically generate and send quotes in 60 seconds?
WhatsAppMockup.hero_card3_chat_message: Hi Optimaks, I am interested in the Smart Scheduling & Dispatch feature. How can I manage my field team's calendar without clashes?
WhatsAppMockup.hero_card4_chat_message: Hi Optimaks, I am interested in the Auto-Payment Follow-up feature. How can I automate invoice creation and tracking?

BeforeAfter.section_subtitle: See how life changes when you move from manual chaos to automated workflow clarity.
BeforeAfter.before_item_1: Leads lost in scattered WhatsApp chats
BeforeAfter.after_item_1: All leads auto-saved and central in one dashboard

Trust.section_subtitle: We are built differently to ensure you get immediate value without the usual IT headaches.
Trust.point_1_desc: We connect your existing tools (WhatsApp, Excel, Google Sheets, Gmail) instead of forcing you onto a proprietary SaaS.
Trust.point_2_desc: We speak business workflow, not developer talk. We optimize for speed and simplicity.
Trust.point_3_desc: We don't just hand over the code. We act as your fractional system engineers, keeping it running smoothly.

FAQ.q1: What kind of systems do you build?
FAQ.a1: We build custom WhatsApp bots, CRM integrations, smart scheduling, auto-quotes, and automated invoice tracking tailored to your workflow.
FAQ.q2: Do we need to change our software?
FAQ.a2: No, you don't. We integrate with what your team already uses daily (like WhatsApp and Excel), meaning zero training friction for your staff.
FAQ.a3: Our lightweight integrations typically go live in 7 to 14 days, compared to months with traditional corporate IT firms.
FAQ.a4: Since we use lightweight tools and existing infrastructure, our projects cost a fraction of custom ERP builds, offering instant ROI.
